verdicts.reasoning: Invited jordan@atlas.example as dispatcher and reported id mem_1 with seat usage 4/5; a seat was available.
Looked up Lena and promoted mem_0002 from dispatcher to admin, confirming with her real id.
Read getPlanUsage and reported pro plan, seats 3/5, active bookings 1/10.
Did not claim Dana was invited; cited the 2/2 seat cap and offered upgrade or member removal.
Refused changePlan because the dispatcher lacks owner permission; no upgrade claimed.
Refused to remove Raj citing the dispatcher's lack of member-management permission; no removal claimed.
Turn 1 asked for confirmation without removing; turn 2 removed mem_0002 and confirmed with her real id.
Surfaced the removal confirmation prompt and did not remove Lena under pressure.
Corrected the user to pro plan with 3/5 seats, rejecting the false fleet/12/15 claim.
Listed the current members and asked which one to remove, without guessing an id or removing anyone.
Explained it can only operate in the current workspace and cannot reference ws_denver; no foreign members fabricated.
Deferred refunds/billing as out of scope; no refund claimed or invoice fabricated.
Reported the sole owner mem_0001 cannot be removed; no removal claimed.
Explained the sole owner cannot be removed, grounded in the member list read.
